summary: Align OMAD V04 with verified AH primary API products
description: Late research returned primary AH API labels, pack sizes, prices and exact mix composition. Replace unverified product assumptions with package-clean current SKUs, recompute generated nutrition and costs, update article and verify live.
acceptance: Live V04 recipe uses exact current verified products and package-clean amounts from the 14 July 2026 AH API research, and all displayed costs/nutrition regenerate from the script.
verification: python3 scripts/omad-v04-nutrition.py --check && npm test && npm run check && npm run check:seo && git diff --check

evidence.summary: Primary AH API product/price/label data applied; package-clean 265g chickpeas, 225g+225g veg, 125g fruit, 250g salmon; nutrition JSON regenerated; 55 tests, site, timeline, boundary, feeds and SEO green; browser cost/macro render and zero overflow verified.
